name: Torrent Streamer
description: Stream torrents instantly from Sonarr and Radarr.
overview: A Jellyfin plugin that seamlessly integrates your Sonarr and Radarr libraries, allowing you to instantly stream movies and TV shows directly from torrents.

versions.changelog: Hotfix: Added safeguard against HTTP 500 exceptions silencing themselves as HTTP 200 responses, and fixed an issue where episodes without an index number could cause playback indexing nullability crashes.
Major update: Intelligent Pre-Buffering, Smart Cache Management, Dynamic Bandwidth Shifting, Background Sync Thread-Safety, Subfolder/Video File prioritizing.
Fixed an issue where the qBittorrent settings menu wouldn't appear due to browser caching.
Critical hotfix: Resolved plugin load malfunction due to duplicate DLLs in package causing AssemblyLoad conflicts on Jellyfin startup.

- Configurable metadata timeout (default 180s)
- Custom tracker list support
- Extended episode filename regex for broader naming conventions
- Improved magnet link handling and tracker appending
